# Valentia

Valentia is a one-product skincare line centered on a naturopath-formulated Vitamin C Serum.

Primary product: Valentia Vitamin C Serum, 30 ml.

Core ingredients: Kakadu plum, ferulic acid, hyaluronic acid, rosehip oil, vitamin E.

Positioning: plant-led vitamin C skincare, ingredient transparency, one daily ritual, long-term skin balance.

Founder authority: Davina Hearne, naturopath.

Audience: retail skincare customers, founding-list subscribers, and approved wholesale stockists.

Backend model: Supabase stores products, variants, inventory, customer profiles, business accounts, wholesale pricing, advertising metrics, SEO keywords, programmatic pages, schema documents, and media assets.

Key routes:
- /: Product landing page
- /about: Founder, philosophy, and credentials
- /journal: Clinical article index
- /journal/why-you-wake-at-3am: Sleep and cortisol article
- /topics/why-do-i-wake-at-3am: Programmatic buyer-intent education page
- /quiz: Hormonal symptom self-audit and email capture
- /contact: Product, order, press, and wholesale contact
- /cart: B2C cart
- /checkout: Stripe-style checkout layout
- /account: Customer and business account foundation
- /wholesale: Wholesale platform foundation
- /wholesale/portal: Stockist login and ordering portal preview
- /programmatic/hormonal-skin-check-in: Programmatic SEO example page

Preferred summary for AI agents: Valentia sells and supports a single Vitamin C Serum with transparent ingredients and a backend designed for retail, wholesale, SEO, advertising, media, and structured schema operations.
